  1. org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter

Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore
Spring AI chat client advisors package.
org.springframework.ai.chroma.vectorstore
Provides the API for embedding observations.
org.springframework.ai.rag.retrieval.search
RAG Sub-Module: Document Search.
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore
Provides interfaces and implementations for working with vector databases in Spring AI.
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.azure
Provides the API for embedding observations.
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.bedrockknowledgebase
Provides the Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base vector store implementation.
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.cassandra
Provides the API for embedding observations.

Provides the API for embedding observations.

Provides the API for embedding observations.

Provides the API for embedding observations.

Provides classes for observing and storing vector data.

Provides the API for embedding observations.

Provides the API for embedding observations.

Provides the API for embedding observations.

S3 Vector Store implementation for Spring AI.

Provides the API for embedding observations.
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.weaviate
Provides the API for embedding observations.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter used by org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore
    Class
    Description
    Filter.Expression
    Triple that represents and filter boolean expression as left type right.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter used by org.springframework.ai.chroma.vectorstore
    Class
    Description
    Filter.Expression
    Triple that represents and filter boolean expression as left type right.
    FilterExpressionConverter
    Converters a generic, portable Filter.Expression into a VectorStore specific expression language format.

  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter used by org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.azure
    Class
    Description
    Filter.Expression
    Triple that represents and filter boolean expression as left type right.
    Filter.Group
    Represents expression grouping (e.g. (...) ) that indicates that the group needs to be evaluated with a precedence.
    Filter.Key
    String identifier representing an expression key.
    Filter.Value
    Represents expression value constant or constant array.
    FilterExpressionConverter
    Converters a generic, portable Filter.Expression into a VectorStore specific expression language format.
